rationale: This archetype is a licensed-IP anime power-fantasy hook (Goku/Dragon Ball) aimed at action-RPG/gacha shounen fans — almost zero overlap with a calm 25-55 casual physics-puzzle audience. There is no character in Bounce Blast 3D, the palette is moody dark purple vs. the archetype's saturated yellow/orange shounen energy, and a screaming punch hook does not telegraph block-placement or chain-reaction gameplay, creating severe message-product mismatch. Hard pass; would also expose the team to IP/legal risk if literally reused.
